allow: Bash(python -c "d=open\(''cards.csv'',''r'',encoding=''utf8''\).read\(\);bad=[c for c in d if ord\(c\)>126];print\(''All clean ASCII'' if not bad else f''Non-ASCII: {set\(bad\)}''\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''''fs''''\);const h=fs.readFileSync\(''''index.html'''',''''utf8''''\);const m=h.match\(/const DEFAULT_CARDS=\\[\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\];/\);const c=eval\(''''[''''+m[1]+'''']''''\);console.log\(''''Cards in index.html: ''''+c.length\);console.log\(''''Last card: id=''''+c[c.length-1].id+'''' title=''''+c[c.length-1].title\);")
